requirement_topic.en: NICTA Type Approval — Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: NICTA型式核准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: NICTA型式核准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment placed on the Papua New Guinea market must hold a valid NICTA type approval certificate issued under the NICTA Act 2009. A technical file and test reports from accredited laboratories are required. CE, FCC, and CCC marks are not recognized by NICTA; however, Australian ACMA (AS/NZS) accredited-lab test reports may be submitted as supporting technical evidence at NICTA's discretion. There is no active Pacific Islands Forum harmonized type approval scheme.
summary.zh: 在巴布亚新几内亚市场上市的所有无线电及电信终端设备，须持有依据《NICTA法》2009年签发的有效NICTA型式核准证书。须提交技术文件及经认可实验室出具的测试报告。NICTA不承认CE、FCC及CCC标志；但经认可实验室出具的澳大利亚ACMA（AS/NZS）测试报告，可酌情作为技术支持证据提交。目前太平洋岛国论坛尚无统一的型式核准方案。
summary.zht: 在巴布亞紐幾內亞市場上市的所有無線電及電信終端設備，須持有依據《NICTA法》2009年簽發的有效NICTA型式核准證書。須提交技術文件及經認可實驗室出具的測試報告。NICTA不承認CE、FCC及CCC標誌；但經認可實驗室出具的澳洲ACMA（AS/NZS）測試報告，可酌情作為技術支持證據提交。目前太平洋島國論壇尚無統一的型式核准方案。

summary.en: China requires MIIT network access license (NAL) and SRRC radio type approval for radio and telecom terminal equipment. CCC certification applies to certain product categories. GB standards form the technical baseline.
summary.zh: 中国要求无线电及电信终端设备取得工信部网络准入许可（NAL）及SRRC无线电型式核准。特定产品类别须取得CCC认证。GB标准为技术基准。
summary.zht: 中國要求無線電及電信終端設備取得工信部網路准入許可（NAL）及SRRC無線電型式核准。特定產品類別須取得CCC認證。GB標準為技術基準。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China

gap.en: NICTA type approval is a separate, PNG-specific certification. Chinese SRRC, CCC, or NAL approval does not satisfy NICTA requirements. New test reports and a technical file must be prepared, and a NICTA certificate must be obtained before import or sale in PNG.
gap.zh: NICTA型式核准是独立的PNG特定认证。中国SRRC、CCC或NAL批准不满足NICTA要求。须准备新的测试报告及技术文件，并在进口或在PNG销售前取得NICTA证书。
gap.zht: NICTA型式核准是獨立的PNG特定認證。中國SRRC、CCC或NAL批准不滿足NICTA要求。須準備新的測試報告及技術文件，並在進口或在PNG銷售前取得NICTA證書。

source.publisher: National Information and Communications Technology Authority (NICTA), Papua New Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC/CCC/NAL approvals are not accepted by NICTA. A standalone NICTA type approval certificate is mandatory for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold or imported into Papua New Guinea. Australian AS/NZS lab test reports may be submitted as supporting evidence only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC/CCC/NAL批准不被NICTA接受。在巴布亚新几内亚销售或进口的所有无线电及电信终端设备，须强制取得独立的NICTA型式核准证书。澳大利亚AS/NZS实验室测试报告仅可作为支持证据提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC/CCC/NAL批准不被NICTA接受。在巴布亞紐幾內亞銷售或進口的所有無線電及電信終端設備，須強制取得獨立的NICTA型式核准證書。澳洲AS/NZS實驗室測試報告僅可作為支持證據提交。
